cultural.name: Demilitarized Zone
cultural.description: Return all structure on this planet to your reinforcements. Then, return all ground forces on this planet to the space area. ATTACH: Units cannot be committed to, produced on or placed on this planet. During the agenda phase, this planet's planet card can be traded as part of a transaction.

cultural.name: Dyson Sphere
cultural.description: ATTACH: This planet's resource value is increased by 2 and its influence value is increased by 1.

cultural.name: Freelancers
cultural.description: You may produce 1 unit in this system; you may spend influence as if it were resources to produce this unit.

cultural.name: Gamme Wormhole
cultural.description: Place a gamma wormhole token in this system. Then, purge this card.

cultural.name: Mercenary Outfit
cultural.description: You may place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on this planet.

cultural.name: Paradise World
cultural.description: ATTACH: This planet's influence value is increased by 2.

cultural.name: Tomb of Emphidia
cultural.description: ATTACH: This planet's influence value is increased by 1. If the player who has the 'Crown of Emphidia' Relic has control of this planet, they can use that relic to gain 1 Victory Point.

cultural.name: Cultural Relic Fragment
cultural.description: ACTION: Purge 3 of your cultural relic fragments to gain 1 Relic.

hazardous.name: Core Mine
hazardous.description: If you have at least 1 mech on this planet, or if you remove 1 infantry form this planet, gain 1 trade good.

hazardous.name: Expedition
hazardous.description: If oyu have at least 1 mech on this planet, or if you remove 1 infantry from this , ready this planet.

hazardous.name: Lazax Survivors
hazardous.description: ATTACH: This planet's resource value is increased by 1 and its influence value is increased by 2.

hazardous.name: Mining World
hazardous.description: ATTACH: This planet's resource value is increased by 2.

hazardous.name: Rich World
hazardous.description: ATTACH: This planet's resource value is increased by 1.

hazardous.name: Volatile Fuel Source
hazardous.description: If you have at least 1 mech on this planet, or if you remove 1 infantry form this planet, gain 1 command token.

hazardous.name: Warfare Research Facility
hazardous.description: ATTACH: This planet has a red technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

hazardous.name: Hazardous Relic Fragment
hazardous.description: ACTION: Purge 3 of your hazardous relic fragments to gain 1 Relic.

industrial.name: Abandoned Warehouses
industrial.description: You may gain 2 commodities, or you may convert up to 2 of your commodities to trade goods.

industrial.name: Biotic Research Facility
industrial.description: ATTACH: This planet has a green technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

industrial.name: Cybernetic Research Facility
industrial.description: ATTACH: This planet has a yellow technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

industrial.name: Funcitoning Base
industrial.description: You may gian 1 commodity, or you may spend 1 trade good or 1 commodity to draw 1 action card.

industrial.name: Local Fabricators
industrial.description: You may gian 1 commodity, or you may spend 1 trade good or 1 commodity to place 1 mech from your reinforcements on this planet.

industrial.name: Propulsion Research Facility
industrial.description: ATTACH: This planet has a blue technology specialty; if this planet already has a technology specialty, this planet's resource and influence values are each increased by 1 instead.

industrial.name: Industrial Relic Fragment
industrial.description: ACTION: Purge 3 of your industrial relic fragments to gain 1 Relic.

frontier.name: Enigmatic Device
frontier.description: Place this card face up in your play area. ACTIONL You may spend 6 resources and purge this card to research 1 technology.

frontier.name: Gamma Relay
frontier.description: Place a gamma wormhole token in this system. Then, purge this card.

frontier.name: Ion Storm
frontier.description: Place the ion storm token in this system with either side face up. Then, place this card in the common play area. At the end of a 'Move Ships' or 'Retreat' sub-step of a tactical action during which 1 or more of your ships use the ion storm wormhole, flip the ion storm token to its opposing side.

frontier.name: Merchant Station
frontier.description: You may replenish your commodities, or you may convert your commodities to trade goods.

frontier.name: Mirage
frontier.description: Place the Mirage planet token in this system. Gain the Mirage planet card and ready it. Then, purge this card.

frontier.name: Unknown Relic Fragment
frontier.description: This card counts as a relic fragment of any type.

frontier.name: Entropic Field
frontier.description: Gain 1 command token and 2 trade goods.

frontier.name: Major Entropic Field
frontier.description: Gain 1 command token and 3 trade goods.

frontier.name: Minor Entropic Field
frontier.description: Gain 1 command token and 1 trade good.

pok.name: Dominus Orb
pok.description: Before you move units during a tactical action, you may purge this card to move and transport units that are in systems that contain 1 of your command tokens.

pok.name: Maw of Worlds
pok.description: At the start of the agenda phase, you may purge this card and exhaust all of your planets to gain any 1 technology.

pok.name: Scepter of Emelpar
pok.description: When you would spend a token form your strategy pool, you may exhaust this card to spend a token from your reinforcements instead.

pok.name: Shard of the Throne
pok.description: When you gain this card, gain 1 victory point. When you lose this card, lose 1 victory point. When a player gains control of a legendary planet you control, or a planet you control in your home system, that player gains this card.

pok.name: Stellar Converter
pok.description: ACTION: Choose 1 non-home, non-legendary planet other than Mecatol Rex in a system that is adjacent to 1 or more of your units that have BOMBARDMENT; destroy all units on that planet and purge its attachments and its planet card. Then, place the destroyed planet token on that planet and purge this card.

pok.name: The Codex
pok.description: ACTION: Purge this card to take up to 3 action cards of your choice from the action card discard pile.

pok.name: The Crown of Emphidia
pok.description: After you perform a tactical action, you may exhaust this card to explore 1 planet you control. At the end of the status phase, if you control the 'Tomb of Emphidia', you may purge this card to gian 1 victory point.

pok.name: The Crown of Thalnos
pok.description: During each combat round, this card's owner may reroll any number of their dice, applying +1 to the results; any units that reroll dice but do not produce at least 1 hit are destroyed.

pok.name: The Obsidian
pok.description: When you gain this card, draw 1 secret objective. You can have 1 additional scored or unscored secret objective.

pok.name: The Prophet's Tears
pok.description: When you research a technology, you may exhaust this card to ignore 1 prerequisite or draw 1 action card.

codices.name: Dynamis Core
codices.description: While this card is in your play area, your commodity value is increased by 2. ACTION: Purge this card to gain trade goods equal to your printed commodity value +2.

codices.name: JR-XS455-0
codices.description: ACTION: Exhaust this agent and choose a player; that player may spend 3 resources to place a structure on a plent they control. If they do not, they gian 1 trade good.

codices.name: Nano-Forge
codices.description: ACTION: Attach this card to a non-legendary, non-home planet you control; its resource and influence values are increased by 2 and it is a legendary planet.

codices.name: Circlet of the Void
codices.description: Your units do not roll for gravity rifts, and you ignore the movement effects of other anomalies. ACTION: Exhaust this card to explore a frontier token in a system that does not contain any other players' ships.

codices.name: Book of Latvinia
codices.description: When you gain this card, research up to 2 technologies that have no prerequsites. ACTION: Purge this card; if you control planets that have all 4 types of technology specialties, gain 1 victory point. Otherwise, gain the speaker token.

codices.name: Neuraloop
codices.description: When a public objective is revealed, you may purge one of your relics to discard that objective and replace it with a random objective from any objective deck; that objective is a public objective, even if it is a secret objective.

te.name: Metali Void Armaments
te.description: During the 'Anti-Fighter Barrage' step of space combat, you may resolve ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE 6(x3) against your opponent's units.

te.name: The Quantumcore
te.description: When you gain this card, gain your breakthrough. You have SYNERGY for all technology types.

te.name: The Silver Flame
te.description: The Silver Flame can be exchanged as part of a transaction. ACTION: Roll 1 die and purge this card; if the result is a 10, gain 1 victory point. Otherwise, purge your home system and all units in it; you cannot score public objectives. Put the Fracture into play if it is not already.

te.name: Lightrail Ordinance
te.description: Your space docks gain SPACE CANNON 5(x2). You may use your space dock's SPACE CANNON against ships that are adjacent to their system.

te.name: Metali Void Shielding
te.description: Each time hits are produced against 1 of your non-fighter ships, 1 of ythose ships may use SUSTAIN DAMAGE as if it had that ability.

te.name: The Triad
te.description: This card can be readied and spent as if it were a planet card. Its resource and influence values are equal to 3 plus the number of different types of relic fragments you own.

te.name: Heart of Ixth
te.description: After any die is rolled, you may exhaust this card to add or subtract 1 from its results.

base.name: Ancient Burial Sites
base.note: At the start of the agenda phase:
base.description: Choose 1 player. Exhaust each cultural planet owned by that player.

base.name: Assassinate Representative
base.note: After an agenda is revealed:
base.description: Choose 1 player. That player cnanot vote on this agenda.

base.name: Bribery
base.note: After the speaker votes on an agenda:
base.description: Spend any number of trade goods. For each trade good spent, cast 1 additional vote for the outcome on which you voted.

base.name: Bunker
base.note: At the start of an invasion:
base.description: During this invasion, apply -4 to the result of each Bombardment roll against planets you control.

base.name: Confusing Legal Text
base.note: When you are elected as the outcome of an agenda:
base.description: Choose 1 player. That player is the elected player instead.

base.name: Construction Rider
base.note: After an agenda is revealed:
base.description: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud the outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, place 1 space dock from your reinforcements on a planet you control.

base.name: Courageous to the End
base.note: After 1 of your ships is destroyed during a space combat:
base.description: Roll 2 dice. For each result equal to or greater than that ship's combat value, your opponent must choose and destroy 1 of their ships.

base.name: Cripple Defenses
base.note: ACTION: Choose 1 planet.
base.description: Destroy each PDS on that planet.

base.name: Diplomacy Rider
base.note: After an agenda is revealed:
base.description: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, choose 1 system that contains a planet you control. Each other player places a command token from their reinforcements in that system.

base.name: Direct Hit
base.note: After another player's ship uses Sustain Damage to cancel a hit produced by your units or abilities:
base.description: Destroy that ship.

base.name: Disable
base.note: At the start of an invasion in a system that contains 1 or more of your opponents' PDS units:
base.description: Your opponents' PDS units lose Planetary Shield and Space Cannon during this invasion.

base.name: Distinguished Councilor
base.note: After you cast votes on an outcome of an agenda:
base.description: Cast 5 additional votes for that outcome.

base.name: Economic Initiative
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Ready each cultural planet you control.

base.name: Emergency Repairs
base.note: At the start of a combat round:
base.description: Repair all of your units that have Sustain Damage in the active system.

base.name: Experimental Battlestation
base.note: After another player moves ships into a system during a tactical action:
base.description: Choose 1 of your space docks that is either in or adjacent to that system. That space dock uses Space Cannon 5(x3) against ships in the active system.

base.name: Fighter Prototype
base.note: At the start of the first round of space combat:
base.description: Apply +2 to the result of each of your fighters' combat rolls during this combat round.

base.name: Fire Team
base.note: After your ground forces make combat rolls during a round of ground combat:
base.description: Reroll any number of your dice.

base.name: Flank Speed
base.note: After you activate a system:
base.description: Apply +1 to the move value of each of your ships during this tactical action.

base.name: Focused Research
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Spend 4 trade goods to research 1 technology.

base.name: Frontline Deployment
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Place 3 infantry from your reinforcements on 1 planet you control.

base.name: Ghost Ship
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Place 1 destroyer from your reinforcements in a non-home system that contains a wormhole and does not contain other players' ships.

base.name: Imperial Rider
base.note: After an agenda is revealed:
base.description: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, gain 1 victory point.

base.name: In The Silence Of Space
base.note: After you activate a system:
base.description: Choose 1 system. During this tactical action, your ships in the chosen system can move through systems that contain other players' ships.

base.name: Industrial Initiative
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Gain 1 trade good for each industrial planet you control.

base.name: Infiltrate
base.note: When you gain control of a planet:
base.description: Replace each PDS and space dock that is on that planet with a matching unit from your reinforcements.

base.name: Insubordination
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Remove 1 token from another player's tactic pool and return it to their reinforcements.

base.name: Intercept
base.note: After your opponent declares a retreat during a space combat:
base.description: Your opponent cannot retreat during this round of space combat.

base.name: Leadership Rider
base.note: After an agenda is revealed:
base.description: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, gain 3 command tokens.

base.name: Lost Star Chart
base.note: After you activate a system:
base.description: During this tactical action, systems that contain alpha and beta wormholes are adjacent to each other.

base.name: Lucky Shot
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Destroy 1 dreadnought, cruiser, or destroyer in a system that contains a planet you control.

base.name: Maneuvering Jets
base.note: Before you assign hits produced by another player's Space Cannon roll:
base.description: Cancel 1 hit.

base.name: Mining Initiative
base.note: ACTION:
base.description: Gain trade goods equal to the resource value of 1 planet you control.

base.name: Morale Boost
base.note: At the start of a combat round:
base.description: Apply +1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls during this combat round.

base.name: Parley
base.note: After another player commits units to land on a planet you control:
base.description: Return the committed units to the space area.

base.name: Plague
base.note: ACTION: Choose 1 planet that is controlled by another player.
base.description: Roll 1 die for each infantry on that planet. For each result of 6 or greater, destroy 1 of those units.

base.name: Political Stability
base.note: When you would return your strategy card(s) during the status phase:
base.description: Do not return your strategy card(s). You do not choose strategy cards during the next strategy phase.

base.name: Politics Rider
base.note: After an agenda is revealed:
base.description: You cannot vote on this agenda. Predict aloud an outcome of this agenda. If your prediction is correct, draw 3 action cards and gain the speaker token.

base.name: Public Disgrace
base.note: When another player chooses a strategy card during the strategy phase:
base.description: That player must choose a different strategy card instead, if able.
